category_sources: source_facts.description says "H.265/HEVC encoder"; official x265 site describes x265 as an HEVC encoder project.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is x265; official x265 site uses the x265 project name.
docs_sources: Official x265 site points users to x265 documentation; x265 Read the Docs is the dedicated documentation surface, with homepage retained as official fallback context.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.homepage is the official Bitbucket repository URL for MulticoreWare x265_git.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies H.265/HEVC encoding; official x265 site presents x265 as an HEVC encoder.
